notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Vinnie Pasquantino reaches on a fielder's choice. Maikel Garcia scores. Bobby Witt Jr. to 2nd. Throwing error by second baseman Cole Young.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Bobby Witt Jr. steals (16) 3rd base. Vinnie Pasquantino steals (2) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Isbel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel grounds into a double play, third baseman Colt Emerson to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Michael Massey out at 2nd. Kyle Isbel out at 1st.
